01-playground-loaded.title: Open the playground
01-playground-loaded.body: The playground starts with a browser-memory workspace and a concrete schema example loaded into the IDE.

02-preview-mode.title: Inspect the preview
02-preview-mode.body: The code/preview toggle moves from schema source editing into the rendered preview for the selected file.

03-prompt-evals-json.title: Switch examples
03-prompt-evals-json.body: Selecting a different example resets the memory workspace and shows the same IDE shell around a new schema domain.
